title: text-underline-offset
description: Controls the gap between text and its underline. Pair it with text-decoration-thickness for full typographic control over underlines — no border-bottom hacks needed. Baseline widely available since 2022.
html:
Default underline: hover over this link sits right against the text.

After styling: hover over this link has proper breathing room.

A longer sentence with a styled inline link to see how it sits in running text across the baseline.
challenge: The default link underline is cramped. Add text-underline-offset: 4px to .link so all links get proper spacing between text and underline.

alternatives.name: Animated underline on hover
alternatives.description: Combine text-decoration-thickness with a transition to animate the underline growing in on hover — a clean interaction that previously required pseudo-element width hacks.

realWorldUsage: Body copy links in editorial sites and documentation, navigation underlines as a design element, and any context where the default browser underline looks too close to the descenders. Also pairs well with text-decoration-color to match brand colors.
